title: Hapan (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Hapan''' was the language developed by residents of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] due to their isolation from the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Due to their limited contact with residents outside the Cluster, [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] was not commonly known to the average [[Hapan]].

==Examples of Hapan phrases==
*''Shakal'' (worthy)
*''[[Ereneda]]'' (She who has no equal)
*''Endara'' (superior technology)
*''Flarett a rellaren?'' (Was dinner spiced well?)
*''[[Chume'da]]'' (heir of the [[Queen Mother]])
*''[[Chume'la]]'' (wife of the son of the Queen Mother)
*''[[Chume Ta'|Chume ta']]'' (unknown meaning, part of the full name of [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]])

==Notable non-native speakers of Hapan==
*[[Borga Besadii Diori|Borga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]<ref name="njos">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref>
